title: 100 Pairs Self-Adhesive Hook and Loop Dots, 20 mm Self Adhesive Sticky Hook and Loop Fastener, Double-Sided Sticky Dots for Crafts on Paper, Plastic, Glass, Metal (White)
features: 【Package Contents】100 pairs of self-adhesive dots with a diameter of 20mm. You will receive a total of 200 glue points: 100 hooks and 100 loops.
【High Quality Material】Adhesive dots are made of high quality polyester and nylon material, good adhesion, can be peeled off without leaving any residue.
【Easy to use】Just peel off the fleece and hook the side of the card, then stick it on the material you want, press hard and you're done.

【Suitable for any smooth surface】It works very well with tile, glass, wood, metal, plastic, leather, etc. Yet it does not work on dusty, wet, greasy surface. For painted wall and thin wall paper, please always test on a small area first.
【Widely Application】The Self-adhesive hook and loop dots can be used in all aspects of life, such as kitchen, office,bathroom, living room,garden and so on.
description: " PLEASE NOTICE: 1.Cleaning is essential. Please use alcohol to clean the surface of the bonding surface and make sure it is smooth, dry and free from dust and oil stains.(Must keep the surface clean). 2.We don't recommend using it on painted wall or poorly attached wall paper as there is a chance it can take the outer layer off when removed. (Please always test on a small area first). 3.Viscosity is proportional to the contact area, suitable for pasting flat items, and can not be used for long-term vertical hanging heavy items (heavy items need to increase the number of pieces). 4.Please keep out of reaching children. Store in a cool dry place away from direct sunlight. "

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: fastening straps, attaching patches, securing items temporarily, adjustable closure system
